title: GUI File Operations (Create, Rename, Shortcut)
interaction_flow: === create_folder(basedir, appendto_element) ===
User → GUI: trigger create_folder(basedir, appendto_element)
GUI: allocate operation_id, set operation_cancelled[id]=false
GUI → puter.fs: mkdir({ path: basedir/New Folder, rename:true, overwrite:false })
puter.fs → GUI: success callback(data) OR error(err)
GUI → DOM: find .item[data-path=dirname/data.name] → el_created_dir
GUI → GUI: activate_item_name_editor(el_created_dir)  [opens inline rename editor]
GUI → actions_history: push({ operation:'create_folder', data: el_created_dir })
alt [err.code === 'directory_depth_limit_exceeded'] GUI → UIAlert: show i18n message
=== create_file(options{dirname, append_to_element, name, content}) ===
User → GUI: trigger create_file(options)
GUI → puter.fs: upload(new File(content, filename), dirname, { generateThumbnails:true })
puter.fs → GUI: success callback(data)
GUI → DOM: find .item[data-path=dirname/data.name] → created_file
GUI → GUI: activate_item_name_editor(created_file)
GUI → actions_history: push({ operation:'create_file', data: created_file })
=== create_shortcut(filename, is_dir, basedir, appendto_element, shortcut_to, shortcut_to_path) ===
User → GUI: trigger create_shortcut(...)
GUI: compute shortcutName = basename(filename) + ' - Shortcut' + extname
GUI → puter.fs: upload(new File([], shortcutName), basedir, { overwrite:false, shortcutTo: shortcut_to_path??shortcut_to, dedupeName:true })
puter.fs → GUI: success / error (logged to console)
=== rename_file(options, new_name, old_name, old_path, el_item, ..., is_undo=false) ===
User → GUI: trigger rename_file(...)
GUI → puter.fs: rename({ uid, new_name, excludeSocketID })
puter.fs → GUI: success callback(fsentry)
alt [!is_undo] GUI → actions_history: push({ operation:'rename', data:{options,new_name,old_name,...} })
alt [extension changed] GUI → window: suggest_apps_for_fsentry(uid)
GUI → DOM: update item-name text, data-name, data-path, title, item-name-editor value on all matching elements
GUI → DOM: update window titles and paths for windows matching uid or old_path prefix
alt [data-has_website=1] GUI → window: update_sites_cache()
GUI → DOM: sort_items on all parent item-containers
puter.fs → GUI: error callback(err) → reset item name in DOM, UIAlert(err.message)
=== undo_create_file_or_folder(item) [via undo_last_action] ===
User → GUI: trigger undo_last_action()
GUI: pop last entry from actions_history → { operation, data }
alt [operation == 'create_file' | 'create_folder'] GUI → GUI: undo_create_file_or_folder(data)
GUI → GUI: delete_item(el_item)
GUI → DOM: fadeOut .item[data-uid] + close matching windows
GUI → puter.fs: delete({ paths: data-path, recursive:true })
puter.fs → GUI: success → removeItems from DOM, update explorer footer counts, clear shortcut references
puter.fs → GUI: error → UIAlert(err.responseText)
alt [operation == 'rename'] GUI → GUI: rename_file(..., is_undo=true)  [swaps new_name/old_name]
key_relationships: GUI (helpers.js) depends_on puter.fs — all FS mutations (mkdir, upload, rename, delete)
GUI depends_on DOM/UIItem — reads/writes data-path, data-uid, data-name attributes post-operation
GUI depends_on actions_history (window global) — push on create/rename for undo support
GUI depends_on UIAlert — error display for depth-limit and rename errors
undo_last_action dispatches to: undo_create_file_or_folder | undo_upload | undo_copy | undo_move | undo_delete | rename_file(is_undo=true)
important_notes: create_folder uses puter.fs.mkdir with rename:true (auto-deduplication server-side); create_file uses puter.fs.upload
create_shortcut uses puter.fs.upload with shortcutTo option; no undo support (not pushed to actions_history)
activate_item_name_editor is called after both create_folder and create_file so user can immediately rename the new item
rename_file is reused for undo-rename by passing is_undo=true and swapping new_name/old_name arguments
rename_file uses excludeSocketID to avoid echo back to the originating socket (collaborative awareness)
delete_item guards against immutable items (data-immutable='1') and cascades window/shortcut cleanup
